parameters.name: prefix_id
parameters.description: Filters to only resources with the specified prefix.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filters to only resources of the specified type: free, paid.

parameters.name: creator_id
parameters.description: Filters to only resources created by the specified user ID.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Method of ordering: last_update, resource_date, rating_weighted, download_count, title

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Either "asc" or "desc" for ascending or descending. Applies only if an order is provided.

parameters.name: XF-Api-User
parameters.description: User ID to execute the request as. Requires a super user API key.

parameters.name: api_bypass_permissions
parameters.description: Whether or not to bypass the context user permissions. Requires a super user API key.
